# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-your-ami-id  # replace with your AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro  # replace with desired instance type
      KeyName: key-name          # replace with SSH key pair name
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 10
            VolumeType: gp2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-your-security-group-id  # replace with security group ID
Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'The ID of the launched EC2 instance'
    Value: !Ref MyInstance
